hero.eyebrow: Singapore · CS Student · Building in Public
hero.headline: Code that builds
hero.sub: Zero overhead. Real results. I document how I'm building affiliate income, bots, and automation tools — for the cost of a domain name.

appCards.title: Knot Bot (Telegram)
appCards.desc: The shared assistant for groups and couples. Track expenses, manage collaborative tasks, and settle balances instantly with PayNow integration. Designed to live in your group chat and keep everyone on the same page.

about.headline:
Built by one CS student.
For $10 a year.
about.p1: I'm a computer science student in Singapore who got tired of waiting for the right moment to build something.
about.p2: The answer so far: yes, but it takes compounding.
about.p3: I started by launching a blog on GitHub Pages. Total cost: $10.35 for the domain.
